name: alfred-cma
description: Alfred CMA control plane — Claude Managed Agents with isolate backend

scripts.db:migrate: wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --local && wrangler d1 migrations apply ALFRED_DB --local
scripts.db:migrate:remote: wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --remote && wrangler d1 migrations apply ALFRED_DB --remote

ENVIRONMENT_ID.description: Anthropic environment ID. Create a Self-managed environment in Claude Platform Console.

ANTHROPIC_ENVIRONMENT_KEY.description: Environment key (sk-ant-oat01-...) for the worker flow.

ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.description: Anthropic API key for Managed Agents API calls.

WEBHOOK_SECRET.description: HMAC signing secret from Anthropic Console webhooks.
